narrative:
Adams County/Oh Valley Lsd (Adams) school district has 14,554 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -22.6% D−R vs -36.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
